page_metadata.biotools__summary: WhichGenes is a web based tool for gathering, building, storing and exporting gene sets with application to gene set enrichment analysis. The user may export a gene set in any desired output format with multiple gene identifiers.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: WhichGenes is a web based tool for gathering, building, storing and exporting gene sets with application to gene set enrichment analysis. The user may export a gene set in any desired output format with multiple gene identifiers.
